scope.goal: Independently review the frozen seven-file P1 Glyph receipt-ledger and attestation-registry candidate for correctness, spec conformance, prior-finding closure, adversarial state ordering, accounting, signatures, identity/purpose trust boundaries, and acceptance-grade test evidence.

filesChanged.change: Created the independent correctness review with frozen-hash evidence, command results, prior-finding dispositions, verdict, findings, invariant results, test gaps, and side-effect declaration.

commands.command: python3 frozen seven-file path-and-content SHA-256 algorithm
commands.purpose: Recomputed fc36f0b30632fd8f0084eac05cc372b0c92d1bb049624abef54a7c46680592ab and matched the frozen candidate exactly.
Compiled 31 files successfully with Solc 0.8.24; warnings only.
Executed the full regression: 35 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped across four suites.

commands.command: forge fmt --check src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol src/interfaces/IGlyphReceiptLedger.sol src/libraries/GlyphSignatureChecker.sol test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol test/mocks/MockERC1271Wallet.sol
commands.purpose: Verified formatting on the exact allowed seven-file contract/test surface.
Validate this handoff against the authoritative handoff schema before exit.

assertions.claim: The reviewed seven-file candidate exactly matches frozen SHA-256 fc36f0b30632fd8f0084eac05cc372b0c92d1bb049624abef54a7c46680592ab.
evidence: Independent execution of the user-supplied path-and-content hashing algorithm returned the exact frozen digest.

assertions.claim: Build, full test execution, and allowed-surface formatting checks pass.
evidence: forge build: exit 0, 31 files compiled with Solc 0.8.24
forge test -vv: exit 0, 35 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped

assertions.claim: Review3 verdict is fail with 0 critical, 0 high, 2 medium, and 1 low findings.
evidence: P1-R3-001: missing ledger accounting/authority branch evidence
P1-R3-002: missing attestation signature/boundary/getter/role-consensus adversarial evidence
P1-R3-003: absent named authoritative architecture inputs

assertions.claim: Prior production correctness findings P1-R2-001, P1-R2-002, P1-R2-003, P1-R2-004, and P1-R2-007 are actually closed in source.
evidence: GlyphReceiptLedger expiry/refund evidence guards and overdelivery reconciliation
GlyphAttestationRegistry role-scoped purpose records, exact claim expiry boundary, and registeredAt ABI
Detailed line evidence in state/reviews/p1-correctness-review3.json priorFindings

assertions.claim: Prior test-evidence findings P1-R2-005 and P1-R2-006 remain open.
evidence: Ledger tests still use implementation helpers as hash oracle, omit claimed terminal and mismatch branches, and do not reach huge-value conservation
Attestation tests still omit changed chain/verifying contract, malformed ECDSA/EIP-1271, exact expiry equality, nonexistent getters, valid non-party authorization, and payer==recipient role consensus

assertions.claim: No contract, test, architecture, configuration, or prior handoff source was modified and no external side effect occurred.
evidence: No deployment, transaction broadcast, funding, signing, or model invocation was performed

risks.description: Acceptance is blocked because required security- and accounting-sensitive adversarial tests are absent or do not reach every branch stated by their names.
risks.mitigation: Add the isolated tests specified by P1-R3-001 and P1-R3-002, freeze a new candidate, and run another independent correctness review.

risks.description: docs/architecture/INVARIANT_MATRIX.md and docs/architecture/MONADGLYPH_TARGET_ARCHITECTURE.md, named as authoritative review inputs, are absent from this workspace.
risks.mitigation: Restore those canonical files or update the authoritative path references; this review used the available docs/architecture/INVARIANTS.md plus P1_LOCKED_DECISIONS.md and related P1 architecture documents.
